context: Latin music detonated on the global stage as 'Despacito' became the most-streamed song in history and spent a record-tying 16 weeks at #1. Ed Sheeran's 'Shape of You' matched its commercial dominance, while Kendrick Lamar's 'HUMBLE.' and Cardi B's 'Bodak Yellow' brought hard-edged hip-hop to pop radio in a year that cemented streaming as the primary chart currency.

tracks.title: Despacito
tracks.artist: Luis Fonsi & Daddy Yankee ft. Justin Bieber
